Localization.Description: Service Kaspersky Security for MS Exchange started/stopped

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The service "{object.name}" informs about a kernel error on host {event_src.host}
The service "{object.name}" is started on host {event_src.host}
The service "{object.name}" cannot be started on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The service "{object.name}" is stopped on host {event_src.host}
